name: python3-pymongo
title: python3-pymongo
summary: Python3 interface to the MongoDB document-oriented database
description:
Python3 interface to the MongoDB document-oriented database
MongoDB is a high-performance, open source, schema-free
document-oriented data store. Pymongo provides an interface
to easily access it from Python3.
Consider installing the python3-pymongo-ext C extension to improve performance.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pymongo because Python3 interface to the MongoDB document-oriented database.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pymongo as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pymongo with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pymongo --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
